---
title: "RNA-seq Analysis Report"
subtitle: "`r if (nzchar(trimws(params$comparison_name %||% ''))) paste('Comparison:', gsub('_',' ',params$comparison_name), '-', format(Sys.time(), '%d/%m/%Y')) else ''`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    theme: united
params:
  run_dir: "."
  comparison_name: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b
run_dir <- normalizePath(params$run_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

rel_path <- function(path) {
  path <- normalizePath(path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  sub(paste0("^", gsub("([][{}()+*^$|\\\\?.])", "\\\\\\1", run_dir), "/?"), "", path)
}

url_rel_path <- function(path) {
  rel <- rel_path(path)
  parts <- strsplit(rel, "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  paste(vapply(parts, utils::URLencode, character(1), reserved = TRUE), collapse = "/")
}

file_link <- function(path, label = NULL) {
  rel <- rel_path(path)
  if (is.null(label)) label <- rel
  paste0("[", label, "](", url_rel_path(path), ")")
}

html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x %||% "")
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\"", "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

html_src <- function(path) {
  url_rel_path(path)
}

safe_include_graphic <- function(path) {
  tryCatch({
    if (is.null(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
      cat("_Plot file is missing: ", rel_path(path), "_\n\n", sep = "")
      return(invisible(NULL))
    }
    cat(
      "<img src=\"", html_src(path), "\" alt=\"", html_escape(basename(path)),
      "\" style=\"max-width:100%; height:auto; border:1px solid #e5e5e5; margin-bottom:18px;\" />\n\n",
      sep = ""
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("_Could not include plot `", basename(path), "`: ", e$message, "_\n\n", sep = "")
    invisible(NULL)
  })
}

section_info <- data.frame(
  folder = c("Core_outputs", "GO", "KEGG", "MSigDB_Hallmark", "PMN", "Gene_Families", "TE_analysis"),
  title = c("Core Differential Expression Outputs", "GO Analysis", "KEGG Analysis", "MSigDB / Hallmark Analysis", "PMN Pathway Analysis", "Gene Family Analysis", "TE Analysis"),
  text = c(
    "Core outputs summarize the loaded differential expression results and quality-control style plots. Volcano and MA plots show the relationship between fold change, significance, and abundance. PCA is included when count-based DESeq2 input was used.",
    "GO outputs test whether biological-process, molecular-function, or cellular-component terms are enriched in the selected DEG direction. REVIGO-like outputs reduce redundant GO terms, offspring summaries inspect selected GO parent terms, and stress tables focus on abiotic-stress related GO groups.",
    "KEGG outputs summarize pathway-level enrichment. Bubble plots show enriched pathways, while Pathview maps color significant genes on the selected KEGG pathway diagram when Pathview could generate a map.",
    "MSigDB Hallmark outputs test whether curated Hallmark gene sets are over-represented in the selected DEG direction. The plot highlights the strongest enriched sets after FDR filtering.",
    "PMN outputs test plant metabolic pathway enrichment for the selected PlantCyc/BioCyc database. Pathway-gene outputs list loaded genes that match selected or top pathways.",
    "Gene family outputs test whether significant genes are over-represented in known gene families. Arabidopsis uses the RA lab gene-family table, while human uses HGNC family tables after ID mapping.",
    "TE outputs summarize Arabidopsis transposable-element related analyses, including TEG enrichment, TEG volcano plots, overlapped TE genes, TE family counts, and TE family enrichment."
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

section_interpretation <- c(
  Core_outputs = "Interpretation: volcano plots separate genes by fold-change and significance; MA plots help check whether fold-change patterns depend on abundance; PCA shows sample-level structure and possible group separation when count data are available.",
  GO = "Interpretation: enriched GO terms point to biological themes among the selected DEG direction. Lower p-values/FDR and higher fold enrichment indicate stronger term over-representation. REVIGO-like plots group redundant GO terms so broader patterns are easier to read.",
  KEGG = "Interpretation: KEGG enrichment highlights pathways whose genes show stronger DEG signal than expected. Pathview maps show where significant expression changes fall inside a pathway diagram; red and blue usually indicate opposite fold-change directions.",
  MSigDB_Hallmark = "Interpretation: Hallmark enrichment tests curated gene programs. Stronger fold enrichment and lower FDR suggest a gene program is over-represented in the selected DEG direction.",
  PMN = "Interpretation: PMN enrichment highlights plant metabolic pathways enriched among selected genes. Pathway-gene plots show which loaded genes contributed to selected or top pathways.",
  Gene_Families = "Interpretation: enriched gene families indicate functional or structural gene groups that contain more significant DE genes than expected by chance. Larger fold enrichment and lower FDR suggest stronger family-level over-representation.",
  TE_analysis = "Interpretation: TEG enrichment and volcano plots summarize transposable-element gene behavior. Overlapped TE plots show DE genes near or inside TAIR10 TEs, enriched TE families, and whether specific TE families are over-represented near the selected gene regions."
)
```

Generated from Run All folder:

`r run_dir`

```{r comparison-subtitle, results='asis'}
if (nzchar(trimws(params$comparison_name %||% ""))) {
  cat("## Comparison\n\n")
  cat("**", html_escape(gsub('_',' ',params$comparison_name)), "**\n\n", sep = "")
}
```

```{r sections, results='asis'}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(section_info))) {
  folder <- file.path(run_dir, section_info$folder[i])
  if (!dir.exists(folder)) next

  files <- list.files(folder, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE, all.files = FALSE)
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]
  if (length(files) == 0) next

  cat("## ", section_info$title[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat(section_info$text[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat(section_interpretation[[section_info$folder[i]]], "\n\n", sep = "")

  image_files <- files[tolower(tools::file_ext(files)) %in% c("png", "jpg", "jpeg", "svg")]
  if (length(image_files) > 0) {
    cat("### Plots\n\n")
    for (img in image_files) {
      cat("**", basename(img), "**\n\n", sep = "")
      safe_include_graphic(img)
    }
  }

  pdf_files <- files[tolower(tools::file_ext(files)) == "pdf"]
  if (length(pdf_files) > 0) {
    cat("### PDF Plots\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- ", vapply(pdf_files, file_link, character(1)), collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")
  }

  csv_files <- files[tolower(tools::file_ext(files)) == "csv"]
  if (length(csv_files) > 0) {
    cat("_Result CSV files were exported in this folder but are not shown in the report._\n\n")
  }

  other_files <- setdiff(files, c(image_files, pdf_files, csv_files))
  if (length(other_files) > 0) {
    cat("### Other Files\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- ", vapply(other_files, file_link, character(1)), collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r run-settings, results='asis'}
settings_file <- file.path(run_dir, "run_all_parameters.csv")
if (file.exists(settings_file)) {
  settings <- tryCatch(utils::read.csv(settings_file, check.names = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(settings) && all(c("Parameter", "Value") %in% names(settings)) && nrow(settings) > 0) {
    cat("## Parameters Used\n\n")
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(settings))) {
      cat("- **", html_escape(settings$Parameter[j]), ":** ", html_escape(settings$Value[j]), "\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```

```{r log-summary, results='asis'}
log_file <- file.path(run_dir, "run_all_log.txt")
if (file.exists(log_file)) {
  cat("## Run Log\n\n")
  log_lines <- readLines(log_file, warn = FALSE)
  cat("```text\n")
  cat(paste(tail(log_lines, 80), collapse = "\n"))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
}
```
